description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/mehranrasulian/laravel-sample:latest with a mysql:5.7 service and set DB_HOST, DB_USERNAME, MYSQL_DATABASE, and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a unit_test job that runs composer install, copies .env.example to .env, runs php artisan key:generate, runs php artisan migrate, and executes vendor/bin/phpunit. In the deploy stage add a deploy_production job that runs only on the master branch, is manual, executes which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y ), starts ssh-agent, adds the SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh and disables StrictHostKeyChecking when inside Docker, and finally runs ~/.composer/vendor/bin/envoy run deploy, deploying to the production environment at http://192.168.1.1.
